title: terminalia corrugata
intro: Terminalia corrugata, also known as the 'corrugated myrobalan', is a plant species native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Combretaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Terminalia corrugata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Terminalia corrugata include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
